_comment: Complete HeyGen v2 payload example showing all scene types.
Default avatar: d46fa7f3801f413d943120285050d6ed (Finmentum Ramy Main - Prod, talking_photo) — use for ALL reels. Avatar name 'The Minimalist Wrist' is deprecated (bracelet artifact).
avatar_id and voice_id come from $FINMENTUM_AVATAR_ID and $FINMENTUM_VOICE_ID env vars.
matting: true ONLY for corner PIP positions (bottom_left_pip, bottom_right_pip, top_left_pip, top_right_pip).
Video backgrounds MUST use video_asset_id (NOT url) to avoid pillarboxing bug.
play_style: 'fit_to_scene' for ALL positions (Jas's explicit preference).
use_avatar_iv_model: true in ALL character objects — enables Avatar IV motion engine (better gestures, expressions, lip sync).
Instagram Reels: use bottom_left_pip (NOT bottom_right_pip) — right side has Instagram engagement UI.
All 'Ramy' in input_text must be replaced with 'Rami' before payload construction.
title: compound-interest-explained

voice.input_text: Hook scene script -- full screen avatar, no matting.
Data scene with Remotion animation b-roll -- bottom LEFT PIP (not right -- Instagram UI), matting enabled.
Pexels stock footage scene -- bottom LEFT PIP, matting enabled.
CTA scene -- full screen, no matting, no b-roll.
